purpose: Single source of en/de user-facing copy for the app (Copy type + getCopy()). This story relabels the block/unblock/blocked-badge/blocked-notice/hidden-filter copy to Block/Blocked/Unblock phrasing and adds new confirm-dialog copy keys for S4 to consume.

public_api.name: getCopy
public_api.description: Existing accessor, unchanged signature. Returns the locale's Copy object; this story only edits string/function values within it and extends the Copy type with 4 new contacts.* keys.

public_api.name: Copy
public_api.description: Extended with 4 new keys under contacts: blockConfirmTitle, blockConfirmBody, blockConfirmButton, blockCancelButton (all string). No existing key signatures changed (archiveAction/unarchiveAction/hiddenBadge/archivedDetailNotice/hiddenFilterLabel/hideHiddenOption/showHiddenOption/hiddenOnlyBody keep their prior types; only their string values change).

reconciliation_note: AC-COPY-1/AC-COPY-2 name copy.contacts.archiveAction/unarchiveAction, but no such keys exist or are consumed anywhere. The live archive/unarchive button (app/pages/profile.tsx:752) reads copy.profile.archiveAction/copy.profile.unarchiveAction — contacts.tsx has no button of its own. Relabeled profile.archiveAction -> 'Block contact'/'Kontakt blockieren' and profile.unarchiveAction -> 'Unblock contact'/'Kontakt entsperren' instead, since that is the actual surface the AC's user-facing intent targets. No orphan contacts.archiveAction/unarchiveAction key was added (would be unconsumed, violating the pre-impl scope question VQ-S5-005/VQ-S5-006 no-orphan-key rule).

keys.blockConfirmBody: Modal body warning that blocking deletes conversation history and blocks the person, string
